records.m_Talk_ENG: We will deal with the small C.O.s under the Doppelganger Shadow's command!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We will deal with the small C.O.s under the Doppelganger Shadow's command!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We will deal with the small C.O.s under the Doppelganger Shadow's command!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Open the way for the Yaksha Division to solely focus on the Doppelganger!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Open the way for the Yaksha Division to solely focus on the Doppelganger!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Open the way for the Yaksha Division to solely focus on the Doppelganger!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph! How annoying!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph! How annoying!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph! How annoying!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're all clones who are no better than livestock! It's laughable!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're all clones who are no better than livestock! It's laughable!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're all clones who are no better than livestock! It's laughable!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stop resisting and succumb to my melody!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stop resisting and succumb to my melody!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stop resisting and succumb to my melody!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not a chance...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not a chance...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not a chance...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh! How dare you interrupt my performance...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh! How dare you interrupt my performance...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh! How dare you interrupt my performance...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fu fuu! No, perhaps this is an opportunity?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fu fuu! No, perhaps this is an opportunity?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fu fuu! No, perhaps this is an opportunity?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...*Slurp*
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...*Slurp*
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...*Slurp*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, is it because you're my original? But even your blood tastes sweet.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, is it because you're my original? But even your blood tastes sweet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, is it because you're my original? But even your blood tastes sweet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dammit. I didn't think she'd claw me like a real cat.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dammit. I didn't think she'd claw me like a real cat.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dammit. I didn't think she'd claw me like a real cat.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fu fuu, but this will only make me hungrier.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fu fuu, but this will only make me hungrier.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fu fuu, but this will only make me hungrier.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Yes...! I'll consume the original first, then take care of the rest
8g!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Yes...! I'll consume the original first, then take care of the rest
8g!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Yes...! I'll consume the original first, then take care of the rest
8g!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Have you forgotten about me? How disappointing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Have you forgotten about me? How disappointing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Have you forgotten about me? How disappointing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph! How about you stop hopping around? You can't even hit me once...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph! How about you stop hopping around? You can't even hit me once...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph! How about you stop hopping around? You can't even hit me once...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh, these icicles are getting on my nerves...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh, these icicles are getting on my nerves...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh, these icicles are getting on my nerves...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Unfortunately for you...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Unfortunately for you...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Unfortunately for you...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I still have some grunts that'll obey my command...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I still have some grunts that'll obey my command...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I still have some grunts that'll obey my command...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The fallen C.O.s are getting back up!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The fallen C.O.s are getting back up!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The fallen C.O.s are getting back up!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I assume that healing C.O.s is that Shadow's unique ability.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I assume that healing C.O.s is that Shadow's unique ability.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I assume that healing C.O.s is that Shadow's unique ability.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Those Elysium Shadows are always such a pain to deal with.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Those Elysium Shadows are always such a pain to deal with.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Those Elysium Shadows are always such a pain to deal with.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Th-then what do we do? Do you have a plan?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Th-then what do we do? Do you have a plan?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Th-then what do we do? Do you have a plan?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? Do I have a plan?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? Do I have a plan?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? Do I have a plan?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We just have to wait now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We just have to wait now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We just have to wait now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, the time has come for me to perform my masterpiece!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, the time has come for me to perform my masterpiece!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, the time has come for me to perform my masterpiece!

records.m_Talk_ENG: K-kgh...! My body...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: K-kgh...! My body...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: K-kgh...! My body...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why can't I move it...?! What's happening...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why can't I move it...?! What's happening...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why can't I move it...?! What's happening...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fu fuu, see? How easier would've this been for you if you didn't resist?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fu fuu, see? How easier would've this been for you if you didn't resist?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fu fuu, see? How easier would've this been for you if you didn't resist?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, after I consume you and become one...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, after I consume you and become one...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, after I consume you and become one...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: My contrabass's string... snapped...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: My contrabass's string... snapped...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: My contrabass's string... snapped...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No... My finger that I was holding the string with suddenly fell off...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: No... My finger that I was holding the string with suddenly fell off...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: No... My finger that I was holding the string with suddenly fell off...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, my legs... Why can't I feel them...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, my legs... Why can't I feel them...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, my legs... Why can't I feel them...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: When did they freeze...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: When did they freeze...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: When did they freeze...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I knew it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I knew it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I knew it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You were so preoccupied in performing that you failed to see around you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You were so preoccupied in performing that you failed to see around you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You were so preoccupied in performing that you failed to see around you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh...!! What is this...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh...!! What is this...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh...!! What is this...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's my Counter ability.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's my Counter ability.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's my Counter ability.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The ice I create continues to lower the surrounding's temperature until the target is completely frozen.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The ice I create continues to lower the surrounding's temperature until the target is completely frozen.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The ice I create continues to lower the surrounding's temperature until the target is completely frozen.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's why I had no intention of aiming directly at you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's why I had no intention of aiming directly at you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's why I had no intention of aiming directly at you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So that you wouldn't notice... you were slowly freezing away from head to toe.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So that you wouldn't notice... you were slowly freezing away from head to toe.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So that you wouldn't notice... you were slowly freezing away from head to toe.

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-wait...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-wait...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-wait...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you know?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you know?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you know?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Bygone Counters are inherently disadvantaged against Elysium Shadows.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Bygone Counters are inherently disadvantaged against Elysium Shadows.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Bygone Counters are inherently disadvantaged against Elysium Shadows.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Our animal-like senses make us very susceptible to your sonic mental attacks.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Our animal-like senses make us very susceptible to your sonic mental attacks.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Our animal-like senses make us very susceptible to your sonic mental attacks.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's why the Yaksha Division lost a lot of good members when we first discovered Elysium Shadows.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's why the Yaksha Division lost a lot of good members when we first discovered Elysium Shadows.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's why the Yaksha Division lost a lot of good members when we first discovered Elysium Shadows.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was only after we paid the hefty price that... we figured it out.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was only after we paid the hefty price that... we figured it out.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was only after we paid the hefty price that... we figured it out.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your obsession for tormenting others with your performances itself is... the flaw that you all have.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your obsession for tormenting others with your performances itself is... the flaw that you all have.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your obsession for tormenting others with your performances itself is... the flaw that you all have.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Eventually, you're all just monsters absorbed by your instruments when the conductor isn't around.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Eventually, you're all just monsters absorbed by your instruments when the conductor isn't around.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Eventually, you're all just monsters absorbed by your instruments when the conductor isn't around.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A-all my fingers are gone...! I can't perform...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: A-all my fingers are gone...! I can't perform...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: A-all my fingers are gone...! I can't perform...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: My legs... I can't move... either of them...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: My legs... I can't move... either of them...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: My legs... I can't move... either of them...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: This was my chance...! My last chance...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: This was my chance...! My last chance...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: This was my chance...! My last chance...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: R-right! Let's talk...! I'll give you any information the Administration wants...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: R-right! Let's talk...! I'll give you any information the Administration wants...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: R-right! Let's talk...! I'll give you any information the Administration wants...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aren't you curious about the future...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aren't you curious about the future...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aren't you curious about the future...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: AAARGH...!! My eyes...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: AAARGH...!! My eyes...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: AAARGH...!! My eyes...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's it like having your eyes freeze from the inside?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's it like having your eyes freeze from the inside?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's it like having your eyes freeze from the inside?

records.m_Talk_ENG: My beautiful eyes...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: My beautiful eyes...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: My beautiful eyes...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: J-just kill me...! KILL ME...!! Please...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: J-just kill me...! KILL ME...!! Please...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: J-just kill me...! KILL ME...!! Please...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Look at you beg after enjoying tormenting my compatriots' minds like they were your toys.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Look at you beg after enjoying tormenting my compatriots' minds like they were your toys.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Look at you beg after enjoying tormenting my compatriots' minds like they were your toys.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh, please...! Just end me...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh, please...! Just end me...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh, please...! Just end me...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm, but you know what?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm, but you know what?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm, but you know what?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry to tell you this, but I'm not the one who's going to kill you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry to tell you this, but I'm not the one who's going to kill you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry to tell you this, but I'm not the one who's going to kill you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Alice Braidwood.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Alice Braidwood.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Alice Braidwood.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Step forward.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Step forward.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Step forward.

records.m_Talk_ENG: H-huh?? Me...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: H-huh?? Me...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: H-huh?? Me...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Though I may have unintentionally helped you, it's you who should finish your debut.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Though I may have unintentionally helped you, it's you who should finish your debut.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Though I may have unintentionally helped you, it's you who should finish your debut.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Defeat the Shadow that's attracted to you with your own hands.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Defeat the Shadow that's attracted to you with your own hands.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Defeat the Shadow that's attracted to you with your own hands.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's Yaksha's tradition.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's Yaksha's tradition.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's Yaksha's tradition.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aaah... Aaack...!! Hurry...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aaah... Aaack...!! Hurry...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aaah... Aaack...!! Hurry...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't care who does it...!! Just end my suffering!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't care who does it...!! Just end my suffering!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't care who does it...!! Just end my suffering!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't hesitate, Alice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't hesitate, Alice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't hesitate, Alice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shadows are monsters disguised as humans. They're our enemy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shadows are monsters disguised as humans. They're our enemy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shadows are monsters disguised as humans. They're our enemy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You said you didn't want to see anyone die anymore, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You said you didn't want to see anyone die anymore, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You said you didn't want to see anyone die anymore, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, these monsters kill without even batting an eye. They'll come for your loved ones.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, these monsters kill without even batting an eye. They'll come for your loved ones.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, these monsters kill without even batting an eye. They'll come for your loved ones.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>AAAGH...! It hurts...! IT HURTS...!!</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>AAAGH...! It hurts...! IT HURTS...!!</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>AAAGH...! It hurts...! IT HURTS...!!</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>WHAT ARE YOU WAITING FOR...?! KILL ME...!! KILL ME!!</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>WHAT ARE YOU WAITING FOR...?! KILL ME...!! KILL ME!!</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>WHAT ARE YOU WAITING FOR...?! KILL ME...!! KILL ME!!</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>ALICE BRAIDWOOD!!</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>ALICE BRAIDWOOD!!</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>ALICE BRAIDWOOD!!</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: You said that Doppelganger-type Shadows are clones of the original person, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You said that Doppelganger-type Shadows are clones of the original person, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You said that Doppelganger-type Shadows are clones of the original person, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I never thought I'd kill someone who looks exactly like me...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I never thought I'd kill someone who looks exactly like me...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I never thought I'd kill someone who looks exactly like me...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dammit, this feels horrible.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dammit, this feels horrible.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dammit, this feels horrible.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't forget how you feel today.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't forget how you feel today.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't forget how you feel today.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because that's what it means to be in the Administration and save the world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because that's what it means to be in the Administration and save the world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because that's what it means to be in the Administration and save the world.

root.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, my legs... Why can't I feel them...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, my legs... Why can't I feel them...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: When did they freeze...?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: When did they freeze...?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: When did they freeze...?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I knew it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I knew it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I knew it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You were so preoccupied in performing that you failed to see around you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You were so preoccupied in performing that you failed to see around you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You were so preoccupied in performing that you failed to see around you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh...!! What is this...?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh...!! What is this...?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh...!! What is this...?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's my Counter ability.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's my Counter ability.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's my Counter ability.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The ice I create continues to lower the surrounding's temperature until the target is completely frozen.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The ice I create continues to lower the surrounding's temperature until the target is completely frozen.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The ice I create continues to lower the surrounding's temperature until the target is completely frozen.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's why I had no intention of aiming directly at you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's why I had no intention of aiming directly at you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's why I had no intention of aiming directly at you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So that you wouldn't notice... you were slowly freezing away from head to toe.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So that you wouldn't notice... you were slowly freezing away from head to toe.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So that you wouldn't notice... you were slowly freezing away from head to toe.

root.m_Talk_ENG: W-wait...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: W-wait...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: W-wait...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Did you know?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Did you know?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Did you know?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Bygone Counters are inherently disadvantaged against Elysium Shadows.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Bygone Counters are inherently disadvantaged against Elysium Shadows.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Bygone Counters are inherently disadvantaged against Elysium Shadows.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Our animal-like senses make us very susceptible to your sonic mental attacks.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Our animal-like senses make us very susceptible to your sonic mental attacks.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Our animal-like senses make us very susceptible to your sonic mental attacks.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's why the Yaksha Division lost a lot of good members when we first discovered Elysium Shadows.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's why the Yaksha Division lost a lot of good members when we first discovered Elysium Shadows.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's why the Yaksha Division lost a lot of good members when we first discovered Elysium Shadows.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It was only after we paid the hefty price that... we figured it out.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It was only after we paid the hefty price that... we figured it out.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It was only after we paid the hefty price that... we figured it out.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Your obsession for tormenting others with your performances itself is... the flaw that you all have.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Your obsession for tormenting others with your performances itself is... the flaw that you all have.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Your obsession for tormenting others with your performances itself is... the flaw that you all have.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Eventually, you're all just monsters absorbed by your instruments when the conductor isn't around.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Eventually, you're all just monsters absorbed by your instruments when the conductor isn't around.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Eventually, you're all just monsters absorbed by your instruments when the conductor isn't around.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A-all my fingers are gone...! I can't perform...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: A-all my fingers are gone...! I can't perform...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: A-all my fingers are gone...! I can't perform...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: My legs... I can't move... either of them...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: My legs... I can't move... either of them...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: My legs... I can't move... either of them...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: This was my chance...! My last chance...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: This was my chance...! My last chance...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: This was my chance...! My last chance...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: R-right! Let's talk...! I'll give you any information the Administration wants...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: R-right! Let's talk...! I'll give you any information the Administration wants...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: R-right! Let's talk...! I'll give you any information the Administration wants...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Aren't you curious about the future...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Aren't you curious about the future...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Aren't you curious about the future...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: AAARGH...!! My eyes...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: AAARGH...!! My eyes...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: AAARGH...!! My eyes...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: What's it like having your eyes freeze from the inside?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What's it like having your eyes freeze from the inside?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What's it like having your eyes freeze from the inside?

root.m_Talk_ENG: My beautiful eyes...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: My beautiful eyes...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: My beautiful eyes...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: J-just kill me...! KILL ME...!! Please...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: J-just kill me...! KILL ME...!! Please...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: J-just kill me...! KILL ME...!! Please...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Look at you beg after enjoying tormenting my compatriots' minds like they were your toys.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Look at you beg after enjoying tormenting my compatriots' minds like they were your toys.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Look at you beg after enjoying tormenting my compatriots' minds like they were your toys.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh, please...! Just end me...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh, please...! Just end me...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh, please...! Just end me...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm, but you know what?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm, but you know what?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm, but you know what?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry to tell you this, but I'm not the one who's going to kill you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry to tell you this, but I'm not the one who's going to kill you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry to tell you this, but I'm not the one who's going to kill you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Alice Braidwood.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Alice Braidwood.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Alice Braidwood.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Step forward.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Step forward.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Step forward.

root.m_Talk_ENG: H-huh?? Me...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: H-huh?? Me...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: H-huh?? Me...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Though I may have unintentionally helped you, it's you who should finish your debut.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Though I may have unintentionally helped you, it's you who should finish your debut.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Though I may have unintentionally helped you, it's you who should finish your debut.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Defeat the Shadow that's attracted to you with your own hands.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Defeat the Shadow that's attracted to you with your own hands.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Defeat the Shadow that's attracted to you with your own hands.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's Yaksha's tradition.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's Yaksha's tradition.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's Yaksha's tradition.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Aaah... Aaack...!! Hurry...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Aaah... Aaack...!! Hurry...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Aaah... Aaack...!! Hurry...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't care who does it...!! Just end my suffering!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't care who does it...!! Just end my suffering!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't care who does it...!! Just end my suffering!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't hesitate, Alice.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't hesitate, Alice.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't hesitate, Alice.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Shadows are monsters disguised as humans. They're our enemy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Shadows are monsters disguised as humans. They're our enemy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Shadows are monsters disguised as humans. They're our enemy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You said you didn't want to see anyone die anymore, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You said you didn't want to see anyone die anymore, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You said you didn't want to see anyone die anymore, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well, these monsters kill without even batting an eye. They'll come for your loved ones.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well, these monsters kill without even batting an eye. They'll come for your loved ones.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well, these monsters kill without even batting an eye. They'll come for your loved ones.

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>AAAGH...! It hurts...! IT HURTS...!!</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>AAAGH...! It hurts...! IT HURTS...!!</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>AAAGH...! It hurts...! IT HURTS...!!</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>WHAT ARE YOU WAITING FOR...?! KILL ME...!! KILL ME!!</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>WHAT ARE YOU WAITING FOR...?! KILL ME...!! KILL ME!!</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>WHAT ARE YOU WAITING FOR...?! KILL ME...!! KILL ME!!</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>ALICE BRAIDWOOD!!</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>ALICE BRAIDWOOD!!</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>ALICE BRAIDWOOD!!</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: You said that Doppelganger-type Shadows are clones of the original person, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You said that Doppelganger-type Shadows are clones of the original person, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You said that Doppelganger-type Shadows are clones of the original person, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I never thought I'd kill someone who looks exactly like me...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I never thought I'd kill someone who looks exactly like me...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I never thought I'd kill someone who looks exactly like me...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Dammit, this feels horrible.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Dammit, this feels horrible.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Dammit, this feels horrible.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't forget how you feel today.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't forget how you feel today.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't forget how you feel today.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because that's what it means to be in the Administration and save the world.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because that's what it means to be in the Administration and save the world.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because that's what it means to be in the Administration and save the world.
